ambiguity.advanced:
REJECTED (ambiguous)
Prediction Set: {prediction_set} (size: {set_size})
Confidence: {confidence}
Interpretation: The model cannot confidently distinguish between the listed classes at the given confidence level.

novelty.advanced:
REJECTED (novel)
Prediction Set: {} (empty)
Confidence: {confidence}
Interpretation: The instance lies outside the training distribution; no class exceeds the p-value threshold.
